LightningComponentBundle.description: Single-selection checkbox or radio group for Screen Flows. Renders a record collection as options, dispatches FlowAttributeChangeEvent on selection, and supports required validation and default value pre-selection.

property.name: displayField
property.label: Display Field API Name
property.description: API name of the field on input records to display as the option label. Defaults to 'Name'.

property.name: inputRecords
property.label: Input Record Collection
property.description: Collection of SObject records to render as selectable options. Pass from a Get Records Flow element.

property.name: label
property.label: Label
property.description: Label text displayed above the selection group. Shown in bold. Absence does not block end users but is required for Flow Builder usability.

property.name: selectionMode
property.label: Selection Mode (Type 'Radio' or 'Checkbox')
property.description: Controls the visual and semantic input type. 'Radio' renders radio buttons with native single-selection behavior. 'Checkbox' renders checkboxes with mutual-exclusion enforced by the component.

property.name: helpText
property.label: Help Text (Tooltip)
property.description: Optional tooltip text displayed next to the label via lightning-helptext. Leave blank for no tooltip.

property.name: isRequired
property.label: Required
property.description: When true, blocks Flow navigation if no option is selected. Validated via the @api validate() method called by the Flow runtime.

property.name: defaultValue
property.label: Default Value (Record ID)
property.description: Salesforce Record ID to pre-select on component load. Must match the Id of a record in the Input Record Collection.

property.name: outputField1ApiName
property.label: Output Field 1 API Name
property.description: API name of a field on the selected record to extract and expose as Output Field Value 1. Leave blank if not needed.

property.name: outputField2ApiName
property.label: Output Field 2 API Name
property.description: API name of a second field on the selected record to extract and expose as Output Field Value 2. Leave blank if not needed.

property.name: selectedRecordId
property.label: Selected Record ID
property.description: Salesforce Record ID of the selected option. Populated when the user makes a selection. Assign to a Flow variable for downstream use.

property.name: outputFieldValue1
property.label: Output Field Value 1
property.description: Value of Output Field 1 API Name from the selected record. Populated on selection. Assign to a Flow variable for downstream use.

property.name: outputFieldValue2
property.label: Output Field Value 2
property.description: Value of Output Field 2 API Name from the selected record. Populated on selection. Assign to a Flow variable for downstream use.
